narrative:
Madison (precinct in Sandusky County) has 803 registered voters, with 51.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 36.0% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 12.8%, a pronounced Republican lean of 23.2 percentage points.
